items.name: agentic-wallet-guard
items.description: Open-source security framework that protects AI agent crypto wallets from prompt injection and unauthorized transactions. 9 security layers including human-in-the-loop approval, address allowlists, rate limits, HMAC file integrity, and a kill switch. Built for Coinbase AgentKit, designed to be wallet-agnostic.
